title: Show swarm list run groups
goal: Implement a small issue #13 UX/observability slice: separate visible swarm members by run in `swarm list` output so old agents and current runs are distinguishable before await/cleanup decisions, without changing orchestration behavior.
permissions: Run cargo fmt/check/test and selfdev build
completionConditions: Default `swarm list` output includes a compact run-group summary when members span run IDs or include unscoped members.
The run-group summary includes counts by run_id, a count for unscoped members when present, and an actionable scoped-list hint.
Existing `swarm list run_id=<id>` behavior and empty-run response remain unchanged.
Focused formatter tests, cargo fmt/check, and selfdev build pass.
failureTaxonomy: Changing membership selection semantics instead of only formatting list output
Making single-run/simple lists noisier than necessary
Omitting compatibility for unscoped legacy members
notes: Keep this additive and format-only. Do not change server selection, cleanup, await, health, or reconcile behavior.
